tokens: Okay, Houston; we're proceeding to Station 9.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: The idea is we're looking for an area as flat as possible with as little evidence of South Ray material.
Probably, the words from the Backroom, you're looking for a shallow saucer.
transcript.speaker: England

tokens: (Laughing) They got the message all right.
Yeah, that's going to be a real good find, Houston.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: I don't think we can do it.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Still in a cobbly area, with boulders up to a meter.
Looks just like our last stop.
Here's a shallow saucer area, but there's no boulder to sneak up on.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: And could we have an amp reading with that ten clicks?
transcript.speaker: England

tokens: Right, we're doing...What does it look like, six or seven, Charlie?
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: It's a little - Well, if you take the parallax out you'd be reading 10, Houston, but nobody can do that.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: I can still see the ascent stage of Orion, Houston.
(Pause) And we're in a boulder field now that has a population of cobble (about 6.4 cm to 25.6 cm) size up through 15 centimeters covering 30 percent of the surface.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: There a better place to go than where we are?
To get there, I don't know where it would be.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: This 015 for 2.7 and according to them, we're almost there.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: I think, well, I think we're just too close to the ray patterns off South Ray.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: All we can do is pick the best you see.
transcript.speaker: England

tokens: (Hearing Tony) Okay; well, let's go on a little further closer to the LM and maybe we'll come across one that isn't so...That's more...
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Because there's no...(Stops to listen) Say again?
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: That would be fine, except a worse problem is to get contamination from the LM (by getting too close to the spacecraft).
We'd rather have contamination from South Ray than from the LM.
transcript.speaker: England

tokens: All righty, we have just found your place.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: There it is, right over there.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: That ain't a hollow; that's a crater!
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Well, it's an old...Down where I come from, it's a 'hollah'.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: That one way...It's over there about 50 meters, 2 o'clock.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Okay; we're gettin...That's up a slope, up on the side of it.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Well, I know, but it's on the side facing the LM, so that would even be better.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: You say it's on the side facing the LM?
We wouldn't want to face the LM.
We want to not see descent.
transcript.speaker: England

tokens: It's on the side of the crater away from the LM.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Tony, you're...Yeah, no way to see the LM from over here.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Yeah, but Charlie, we can't get off and sample around it.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Oh, okay; let's drive up here.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Did you get a little dust there, Charlie?
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Only trouble is, John, this rock's so big you can't even reach over it.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Yeah, but you can sneak around on the side.
(Pause) This is a steep slope right here, babe!
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: That's what I was telling you!
How about that rock right there?
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: That one right here is fine.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Yeah, that's...Yeah, this is 180 parking, I guess.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: You parked right in a crater, for me.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: (Pause) (Laughing) Everywhere...I say you parked in a crater...Everywhere you go, there's a crater.
Might as well just take my chances.
See that little hole you parked on there?
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: We copy that and DAC off.
transcript.speaker: England

tokens: We copy that and DAC off.
transcript.speaker: England

tokens: (Laughing) Thank goodness (for the low motor temperatures).
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: (Turning on the TV) Okay, we'll get old number 2 on the Mode switch.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Oh, there you go again, Charlie.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Let me get up off the ground.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Can you turn towards the Sun?
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Okay, I'll get a pan out here.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Yeah, I'll get the old high-gain up.
transcript.speaker: Young
